covered_sentences: Fear of danger is ten thousand times more terrifying than danger itself.
I no longer trusted in god as I had before.
If I had kept my trust in god, I would have been more cheerful in this new distress.
storyboard_assets.prompt:
Single-panel composition, diagonal organization with pressure/scale contrast; camera slightly elevated, positioned at the left of the protagonist, medium-close shot; protagonist sits hunched against the tent's rear earth wall, knees drawn up, making himself small; the tent walls and dark shadows press in from both sides and above, emphasizing psychological compression; a faint glow of morning light seeps under the tent flap at lower-right, representing the faith he is losing touch with.

Protagonist sits curled against the earth wall, arms wrapped around his knees, head slightly bowed, gaze unfocused and hollow — expression of someone caught between fear and self-reproach; no speech bubble, no thought-bubble; the shadow of the tent canvas forms diagonal lines pressing in from upper-left toward him; the small sliver of pale light at the tent flap lower-right is the only warmth in the frame, but the protagonist's gaze does not reach it.

Scene: inside tent shelter camp (S11), early dawn or night, only faint ambient pre-dawn light under the tent flap, the interior is in heavy shadow; earthen floor, tent canvas walls, wooden crate dimly visible at left edge.

Very dark palette, predominantly cool blue-gray shadows; only the narrow tent-flap gap emits a thin strip of warm amber light at lower-right; high contrast between the compressed dark interior and that faint warmth; protagonist's face catches minimal cool side light, accentuating isolation.

Protagonist (island castaway version): brown short straight hair, short beard, goatskin jacket worn with collar turned up, wide-brimmed hat off and lying on the floor beside him, goatskin trousers, leather-strap sandals; protagonist's crouched figure occupies center-lower frame, head at roughly half panel height; tent canvas ceiling clearly above him; earth wall directly behind him; wooden crate visible at left edge at roughly his shoulder height while sitting; the thin strip of light at tent flap lower-right about one-eighth panel width.

STYLE_PLACEHOLDER.

Character appearance, clothing details, and scene furniture strictly follow reference images; no self-added or modified details; character proportions consistent throughout. No Chinese text in image; no watermark; no extra figures; proportions natural; spatial relationships clear. No outer border on single-panel image. Scene fingerprint: canvas tent shelter + cliff-face earth wall + wooden crate on earthen floor, positions and forms unchanged. Protagonist (island version): hair color must not change, goatskin jacket must not be replaced, wide-brimmed hat off and on floor, short beard must not be removed. Proportion anchors: crouching protagonist head at roughly half panel height; tent canvas ceiling visible clearly above; crate at his shoulder height while seated; tent flap light strip at lower-right occupying about one-eighth panel width. No floating text, no caption, no label text. 【情绪标记】强度：中，类型：恐惧/悲伤，推荐视觉手段：hunched posture with compressed diagonal shadows pressing inward; protagonist's hollow unfocused gaze; cold blue-gray palette with only a thin warm sliver of light he cannot reach.
